videos.headline: Jordan James punches it in for an Oregon TD
videos.description: Jordan James powers it across the goal line to get Oregon on the board vs. Maryland.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jordan James punches it in for an Oregon TD) 2024/11/10 ESHEET

videos.headline: Brandon Johnson houses one off a Maryland fumble
videos.description: Brandon Johnson picks up a Billy Edwards fumble and takes it to the house for an Oregon touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Brandon Johnson houses one off a Maryland fumble) 2024/11/10 ESHEET

videos.headline: Roman Hemby muscles in a Maryland TD
videos.description: Roman Hemby drives across the goal line to close the deficit for Maryland.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Roman Hemby muscles in a Maryland TD) 2024/11/10 ESHEET

videos.headline: Gabriel connects with Ferguson to pad Ducks' lead before halftime
videos.description: Dillon Gabriel finds Terrance Ferguson in the back of the end zone to extend Oregon's lead over Maryland going into halftime.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Gabriel connects with Ferguson to pad Ducks' lead before halftime) 2024/11/10 ESHEET

videos.headline: Billy Edwards Jr. finds Octavian Smith Jr. to cut Maryland's deficit
videos.description: Billy Edwards Jr. finds Octavian Smith Jr. to cut Maryland's deficit

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Billy Edwards Jr. finds Octavian Smith Jr. to cut Maryland's deficit) 2024/11/10 ESHEET

videos.headline: Sabrina Ionescu shows off WNBA Championship Trophy in Eugene
videos.description: Oregon alum and New York Liberty star Sabrina Ionescu returns to her alma mater to show off the WNBA Championship Trophy.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Sabrina Ionescu shows off WNBA Championship Trophy in Eugene) 2024/11/10 ESHEET

videos.headline: Dillon Gabriel finds Evan Stewart to pad Oregon's lead
videos.description: Dillon Gabriel hits Evan Stewart in stride to extend Oregon's lead over Maryland.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Dillon Gabriel finds Evan Stewart to pad Oregon's lead) 2024/11/10 ESHEET
